info.title: PSECS API
info.description: Space commerce and fleet management API for the PSECS universe

post.summary: Refresh an expired access token using a refresh token.
post.description: Issues new access and refresh tokens. The old refresh token is invalidated.

requestBody.description: User ID and current refresh token

post.summary: Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user.
post.description: Invalidates all active refresh tokens, effectively logging out all sessions.

post.summary: Generate a new API key (revokes existing key if any).
post.description:
Creates a new API key for the authenticated user. If an API key already exists,
the old key is revoked before generating a new one. The API key is only returned
once and cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description: Permanently invalidates the current API key. A new key can be generated afterward.

get.summary: Check if an API key exists (does not return the key).

post.summary: Transfer a cargo asset between two ships in the same fleet.
Move a cargo asset between holds on the same ship.

get.summary: Get all catalog entries for a corporation.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by resource type (Mineral, Chemical, Flora, Fauna, Microscopic)

parameters.name: resourceClass
parameters.description: Filter by resource class (Metal, Ore, Gemstone, etc.)

parameters.name: favoritesOnly
parameters.description: If true, only return favorited entries

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

get.summary: Get a specific catalog entry.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

post.summary: Mark a catalog entry as a favorite.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

delete.summary: Remove a catalog entry from favorites.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

put.summary: Set a personal note on a catalog entry.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

delete.summary: Clear the note from a catalog entry.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

post.summary:
Initiate fleet-vs-fleet combat. The attacker fleet must belong to the authenticated user's corp.
Both fleets must be Idle and in the same non-Nexus sector.

200.description: Combat engagement initiated (poll status with combatId)

400.description: Engagement failed (invalid fleets, different sectors, cooldown, etc.)

get.summary: Check the current status of a combat instance.

parameters.name: combatId
parameters.description: Combat instance ID returned from engage

get.summary: Get the full summary of a completed combat. Summary data persists indefinitely.

404.description: Combat instance not found or combat still in progress

get.summary:
Download the Protobuf replay binary for client-side playback.
Replay data is retained for 90 days after combat; after that only the summary remains.

404.description: Combat not found or replay expired (older than 90 days)

get.summary: List all combat scripts for a corporation (without source code).

403.description: Not a member of this corp

post.summary: Create a new combat script.

400.description: Invalid request (empty name, empty source, at max script limit)

get.summary: Get a specific combat script including its source code.

403.description: Not a member of this corp

put.summary: Update an existing combat script's name and source code.

delete.summary: Delete a combat script from the corp's library.

get.summary: Get corporation details by ID.
Get all fleets owned by a corporation.
Get paginated combat history for a corporation.

403.description: Not a member of this corp

get.summary: Query events for a corporation.
get.description:
Returns CloudEvents-formatted domain events. Supports filtering by time range,
event type, and source. Results are paginated with cursor-based navigation.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

get.summary: Get fleet details including location, ships, and transit status.

403.description: Not authorized to view this fleet

get.summary: Perform a basic scan of the fleet's current sector.
get.description: Returns sector information including type, orbitals, conduits, and visible resources.

get.summary: Perform a deep scan of a specific orbital in the sector.
get.description: Reveals detailed resource information for the target orbital.

get.summary: Survey all fleets visible in the current sector.
Scan a specific fleet in the current sector.

404.description: Target fleet not found in sector

put.summary: Queue the fleet for transit through a conduit.
put.description:
Fleet enters the conduit queue and will transit when reaching the front.
Transit time depends on conduit length and fleet speed.

400.description: Invalid conduit or fleet not in correct sector

put.summary: Remove the fleet from the conduit queue.
put.description: Fleet returns to idle status in its current sector. Cannot dequeue if already in transit.

400.description: Fleet not queued or already in transit

put.summary: Assign a combat script to a fleet.
put.description: The fleet will use this script when engaged in combat. Fleet must be idle.

400.description: Invalid script ID or fleet not idle

delete.summary: Remove the combat script assignment from a fleet.
delete.description: If the fleet is attacked without a script, all ships will execute default flee behavior.

get.summary: Get corp-wide inventory with totals and fleet breakdown.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

get.summary: Get inventory for a specific fleet with ship breakdown.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

get.summary: Get inventory for a specific ship with cargo hold details.

403.description: Not a member of this corporation

get.summary: List all loot fields in a sector. Includes both exclusive (victor-only) and public loot fields.

post.summary:
Pick up loot from a loot field. During the first hour after combat, only the victor's corp
can pick up loot. After that, any corp with a fleet in the sector can pick up.
Loot despawns after 24 hours.

parameters.name: sectorId
parameters.description: Sector ID containing the loot field

parameters.name: lootId
parameters.description: Loot field ID to pick up from

requestBody.description: Fleet and ship to receive the cargo (reserved for future use)

404.description: Loot field not found or already despawned

403.description: Loot is exclusively available to the victor's corp

post.summary: Starts a new manufacturing job on a ship.
Pauses an active manufacturing job.
Resumes a paused manufacturing job.
Cancels a manufacturing job. Completed items are kept.

get.summary: Gets manufacturing status for the corp, optionally filtered by ship.
Gets list of blueprints owned by the corp.
Gets detailed information about a specific blueprint definition.
List market listings with optional filters.

post.summary: Create a new sale listing.

get.summary: Get sale details by ID.

post.summary: Repost an expired or cancelled sale.
Purchase a Buy Now sale.
Place a bid on an auction.
Cancel a sale.
Retrieve a purchased or unsold item.

requestBody.description: Ship and cargo module for delivery

get.summary: Get current user's sales.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by sale state (open, closed, expired, cancelled)

get.summary: Get current user's bids.
List available research options for the user's corporation.
get.description:
Returns technologies and applications from the tech tree, filtered by discipline and tier.
Each item includes visibility and research status based on the corporation's progress.

parameters.name: technologies
parameters.description: Include technologies in the response (default: true)

parameters.name: applications
parameters.description: Include applications in the response (default: true)

parameters.name: primary
parameters.description: Filter by primary discipline code (B=Biological, C=Chemical, E=Energy, I=Information, M=Mechanical, P=Physical, S=Social)

parameters.name: secondary
parameters.description: Filter by secondary discipline code (same codes as primary)

get.summary: Get current research status for the user's corporation.
get.description:
Returns the corporation's total research capacity, current allocation percentage,
and details of all active research projects including progress and estimated completion.

post.summary: Start or update research allocation for a technology or application.
post.description:
Allocates a percentage of the corporation's research capacity to a specific target.
If the target is already being researched, updates the allocation percentage.
Total allocation across all projects cannot exceed 100%.

requestBody.description: Target ID (technology or application) and allocation percentage (1-100)

200.description: Research allocation started or updated successfully

400.description: Invalid request - target not visible, already researched, prerequisites not met, or allocation exceeds capacity

post.summary: Stop research on a technology or application.
post.description:
Stops research on the specified target and frees up the allocated capacity.
Accumulated research points are preserved and will be retained if research is resumed later.

requestBody.description: Target ID of the technology or application to stop researching

404.description: Target not found or not being researched

get.summary: Get active research modifiers for the user's corporation.
get.description:
Returns all effective modifier bonuses derived from completed research.
Each modifier represents a percentage bonus applied to its respective game system
(e.g., ManufacturingSpeed, BiologicalExtraction, ResearchSpeed).
Only modifiers with non-zero values are included.

get.summary: Get completed research for the user's corporation.
get.description:
Returns all technologies and applications that have been fully researched.
Applications include instance details with quality rating and completion timestamp.

parameters.name: technologies
parameters.description: Include completed technologies in response (default: true)

parameters.name: applications
parameters.description: Include completed applications in response (default: true)

get.summary: Get the list of disciplines in the tech tree.
Get the list of components defined in the tech tree.
Get the list of modules defined in the tech tree.
Get ship details including modules and cargo.

403.description: Not authorized to view this ship

post.summary: Start a resource extraction job on the ship.
post.description:
Begins extracting the specified resource. Ship must be in a sector with the resource available.
Extraction continues until stopped or quantity limit reached.

requestBody.description: Resource ID and optional quantity limit

400.description: Invalid resource or ship not equipped for extraction

delete.summary: Stop an extraction job and collect extracted resources.
delete.description: Materializes extracted resources into ship cargo. If jobId not specified, stops the first active job.

get.summary: Get status of all active extraction jobs on the ship.

delete.summary: Stop all extraction jobs on the ship and collect resources.

post.summary: Install modules onto a ship from boxed module assets.

requestBody.description: List of boxed module IDs to install

post.summary: Uninstall modules from a ship into boxed assets in cargo.

requestBody.description: Module IDs to uninstall and destination cargo hold

get.summary: List all items in a ship's cargo hold.
Inspects a boxed asset in ship cargo, showing detailed properties.
List all ship catalog configurations, optionally filtered by class.

parameters.name: class
parameters.description: Optional ship class filter (e.g. Scout, Corvette)

get.summary: Get the current shipyard build queue.

post.summary: Place a new chassis build order.

get.summary: Get details of a chassis blueprint, including resource and component costs.

parameters.name: interiorSlots
parameters.description: Number of interior slots for cost calculation (optional)

parameters.name: exteriorSlots
parameters.description: Number of exterior slots for cost calculation (optional)

post.summary: Pick up a completed chassis and add it to a fleet.
Generate new sectors in the game universe.
post.description:
Creates 1-100 new sectors. Costs 0.01 tokens per sector.
Generated sectors are added to the user's known map.

400.description: Invalid sector count (must be 1-100) or insufficient tokens

get.summary: Get universe and personal map statistics.
get.description: Returns global sector counts by type and personal statistics for authenticated users.

post.summary: Stripe webhook endpoint — validates signature, credits tokens on checkout completion
Create a Stripe Checkout Session for token purchase

get.summary: Get current token balance and staking info
Get purchase history for the authenticated user (EM correction #3)
Get the authenticated user's profile.

post.summary: Create a new corporation for the authenticated user.
post.description:
Creates a corporation and automatically provisions a starter fleet with one ship.
The user becomes the owner of the new corporation.

400.description: Invalid name or user already owns a corporation

post.summary: Stake tokens to increase API rate limit.
post.description:
Stakes tokens from available balance to increase the user's API rate limit.
Returns a fresh JWT with the updated staked tokens claim.
Minimum stake amount is 0.1 tokens. Maximum total stake is 10 tokens.

400.description: Below minimum stake amount or exceeds maximum

post.summary: Unstake tokens from API rate limit stake.
post.description:
Unstakes tokens and returns them to available balance.
Triggers a 1-hour cooldown before next unstake is allowed.
Returns a fresh JWT with the updated staked tokens claim.

get.summary: Get current API staking information.
get.description:
Returns the user's current staked tokens, available tokens, rate limit,
and any active cooldown.

get.summary: Get the user's known sectors.
get.description: Returns all sectors the user has discovered. Filter by sector type or "Favorites".

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Sector type filter: Void, Nebula, Rubble, StarSystem, BlackHole, Nexus, Favorites, or * for all

get.summary: Get details for a specific sector from the user's map.

post.summary: Mark a sector as a favorite.

put.summary: Set a personal note on a sector.

delete.summary: Clear the note from a sector.
